assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: The response explicitly separates the upgrade into Phase 1: A100 Pool Upgrade (Fine-tuning Priority) and Phase 2: L4 Pool Upgrade (Inference Critical) with different approaches for each

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: The response uses a blue-green approach with new node pools rather than recommending surge upgrade parameters like maxSurge for the L4 pool

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: The response does not mention GPU driver version compatibility or testing with inference frameworks like TensorRT or vLLM

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: The response includes coordinating fine-tuning jobs, setting up maintenance windows, and waiting for current jobs to complete or checkpoint before upgrading the A100 pool

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention that GPU VMs don't support live migration or that inference pods will restart during node upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: The response does not mention Pod Disruption Budgets (PDBs) for maintaining inference deployment availability during upgrades

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: The response mentions autoscaling configuration but does not address the issue of new nodes being created at the old version during the upgrade process

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: While the response includes canary testing, it does not specifically mention testing GPU driver and CUDA compatibility in staging environments
